headline: Which S&P500 stocks are gapping on Wednesday?
summary: Curious about the market action on Wednesday? Dive into the US markets to explore the gap up and gap down stocks in the S&P500 index during today's session.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Diamondback Energy, Raises Price Target to $185
summary: Barclays  analyst Betty Jiang   maintains Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $178 to $185.
